steps.t: Ringhul is at his post on the High Moor, north and east of Tâl Bruinen. Candelleth told you that the brooch you found belong to a former scout of hers…
Arifael lives on the slope of Amon Nendir, south of the High Moor on the eastern edge of the Trollshaws. Elrohir is concerned about the giant footprin…
